halibut-cakes-croquettes.name: Halibut Cakes (croquettes)

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add halibut fillets; season with salt and pepper. Cook until flesh flakes easily with a fork, about 4 minutes per side. Transfer to a plate; cool until easily handled, about 5 minutes. Flake into small chunks.

Mix Italian cheese blend, egg, mayonnaise, onion, lemon juice, 2 tablespoons bread crumbs, Worcestershire sauce, garlic powder, dry mustard, and seafood seasoning together in a large bowl. Gently mix in flaked halibut, adding more mayonnaise if the mixture seems dry.
Pour 3/4 cup bread crumbs into a shallow dish. Shape halibut mixture into 6 cakes and dip both sides in bread crumbs to coat.
Heat remaining 2 tablespoons oil in the skillet over medium-high heat. Add halibut cakes and cook until browned, about 5 minutes per side.

halibut-fillets.name: Halibut Fillets
instructions: Combine melted butter, honey, lemon juice, liquid aminos, pepper, and garlic in a small bowl; mix to combine.
Brush both sides of the halibut fillets with the butter sauce.

Heat a cast iron skillet over very high heat. Add halibut filets and sear on each side for 90 seconds. Reduce heat to medium-high and cook on each side until fish can be easily flaked with a fork, 2 to 3 minutes per side.

harissa-honey-popcorn-chicken.name: Harissa-honey Popcorn Chicken

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.75 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: boneless chicken thighs, cut into 1" pieces

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt; plus more

ingredients.prep: cucumber spears, and carrot sticks; for serving)

instructions: Place ½ preserved lemon, seeds removed, on a cutting board and finely chop. Using the back of your knife, mash into a coarse paste and transfer to a large bowl. Add 1 large egg, 4 garlic cloves, finely grated, zest of 1 lemon, 1 cup low-fat buttermilk, ⅓ cup cornstarch, and 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt to bowl and whisk to combine. Add 2¼ lb. skinless, boneless chicken thighs, cut into 1" pieces. Mix well to make sure each piece is coated in marinade; cover and chill at least 4 hours and up to 12 hours.

Whisk 1½ cups rice flour, remaining ¾ cup cornstarch, and remaining ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a large shallow dish to combine. Remove one third of chicken from bowl, letting some of the marinade drip back into bowl, and arrange in a single layer on rice flour mixture. Gently toss chicken to coat, pressing down into mixture and turning to make sure every nook and cranny is covered. Transfer to a large plate. Repeat with remaining chicken in 2 batches.

Pour vegetable oil into a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot to come 2" up the sides. Fit pot with thermometer and heat oil over medium-high until thermometer registers 350°. Working in 3–4 batches, fry chicken, turning occasionally, until cooked through and golden brown, 7–10 minutes. Using a spider or slotted spoon, transfer to a wire rack set inside a rimmed baking sheet and let drain.
While the chicken is frying, heat ½ cup (1 stick) unsalted butter and 3 Tbsp. medium-bodied honey (such as orange blossom) in a small saucepan over medium until butter is melted.

Scrape honey butter into a large bowl, add 6 Tbsp. harissa paste, 2 Tbsp. fresh lemon juice, and ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and whisk until smooth and emulsified. Taste sauce and season with more salt if needed.
Place fried chicken in sauce and toss until every piece is well coated.
Arrange chicken on a platter and serve with crunchy raw vegetables (such as radishes, cucumber spears, and carrot sticks) alongside.

harput-meatballs-lezzet.name: Harput Meatballs
instructions: 1. Clean the onions and parsley and shore.
2. Take a rough pit along with onion the rest of Maydanoz until 1 tablespoon.
3. Add red pepper, reyhan, salt and pepper and rub it with your hands.
4. Add and knead to the mixture with onion.
5. Add Bulguru and knead for 7-8 minutes.
6. Cover over with a damp cloth and wait for 10 minutes.
7. Shape the pieces of walnut size from the mortar and rolling in your hands.
8. Press the middle of each meatballs with the tip of your finger.
9. For sauce, melt the butter in the pot.
10. Add tomato and pepper shakes.
11.  1-2 dakika kavurup suyu ilave edin.
12. Slowly add meatballs with water boiling.
12. August Bake up to 15 minutes on the ground fire.
14 July Share on the service plates and decorate them with chopped parsley.
15. Serve hot.
16. You can also try the recipe of populated meatballs prepared with fine bulgur.

herb-roasted-turkey.name: Herb-roasted Turkey

ingredients.prep: giblets and neck removed, at room temperature for 1 hour

instructions: Preheat oven to 450°. Set a rack inside a large roasting pan. Pat turkey dry with paper towels. Rub bird inside and out with salt and pepper. Place turkey on the rack in the pan. Using a fork, mix butter, lemon zest, rosemary, sage, and thyme in a small bowl. Rub herb butter over top of turkey and inside cavity.

Place onion, orange, and lemon inside turkey cavity. Tuck tips of wings under bird (this prevents them from burning during the long roasting time). Pour 4 cups water into pan. Roast turkey, uncovered, for 30 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 325°. Baste turkey with pan juices; add more water if needed to maintain at least 1/4" liquid in the bottom of roasting pan. Continue roasting turkey, basting every 30 minutes and tenting with foil if skin is turning too dark, until an instant-read thermometer inserted into thickest part of the thigh without touching bone registers 165° (juices should run clear when thermometer is removed), about 2 3⁄4 hours total.
Transfer turkey to a platter. Tent with foil and let rest for 1 hour before carving

hot-and-spicy-himalayan-tea-chai-tea.name: Hot And Spicy Himalayan Tea (chai Tea)
instructions: Combine water, brown sugar, ginger, cinnamon stick, cardamom pods, cloves, bay leaves, fennel seeds, and peppercorns together in a pot; cover and boil for 20 minutes.
Remove from the heat, add tea leaves, and allow to steep for 10 minutes. Stir milk into tea mixture and bring to a boil. Strain tea into tea cups.

hot-fudge-ice-cream-bar-dessert.name: Hot Fudge Ice Cream Bar Dessert
instructions: Pour the chocolate syrup into a medium microwave-safe bowl and microwave until hot, about 2 minutes on high, stopping every 30 seconds. Do not allow to boil. Stir peanut butter into hot chocolate until smooth. Allow to cool to room temperature.

Line the bottom of a 9x13-inch dish with a layer of ice cream sandwiches. Spread half the whipped topping over the sandwiches. Spoon half the chocolate mixture over that. Top with half the peanuts. Repeat layers. Freeze until firm, at least 1 hour. Cut into squares to serve.

Combina en un recipiente las fresas picadas y la mermelada que preparaste y, luego, esparce bien para cubrir todo el pay. Deja reposar en el refrigerador nuevamente durante 20 minutos.

how-to-make-sugar-free-enchilada-mango-g.name: How To Make Sugar-free Enchilada Mango Gummies
how-to-make-sugar-free-enchilada-mango-g.original_name: Cómo hacer gomitas de mango enchiladas sin azúcar
instructions: In a container, a mixture of Grenetin with 2 tablespoons of water at a time. Swallow well and let hydrate for 10 minutes.
Once hydrated, melt into the microwave for 15 seconds.
Meanwhile, in a food processor or a blender adds the mango, the aquay stevia.
Triture well till there are no clumps or pieces of fruit.
Then pour the melted Grenetin into the mixture and tighten again.
Filling the mold with the mango jelly and let them be put into the refrigerator for 4 hours.
Unmold and pass the gumies through the chili powder.
Enjoy with sugarless Chamoy!

how-to-make-the-typical-madrid-squid-san.name: How To Make The Typical Madrid Squid Sandwich
how-to-make-the-typical-madrid-squid-san.original_name: Cómo hacer el mejor bocadillo de calamares típico de Madrid
instructions: We clear the cramps and remove their skin and their pen and their whole inside. Once we have been clear, we cut them and dry them with some kitchen paper.
Los rebozamos en la harina de garbanzos
We fry into abundant hot oil till they're golden.
We leave the bread, put mayonnaise and squid. And that's it... we just have to enjoy and delight with this typical Madrid snack.

how-to-prepare-a-delicious-broccoli-crea.name: How To Prepare A Delicious Broccoli Cream With Zucchini
how-to-prepare-a-delicious-broccoli-crea.original_name: Cómo preparar una deliciosa crema de brócoli con calabacín
instructions: Wash and cut the broccoli and pumpkin into small pieces.
Peel and cut onion and garlic into small pieces.
In a large pot, heats olive oil with medium heat and adds onion and garlic. Cooking till onion's clear.
Add the broccoli and pumpkin to the pot and cook for a few minutes.
Add the vegetable stock and lead to boiling. It reduces fire and lets them cook at low heat till the vegetables are soft.
Remove the pot from the fire and let the mixture cool a little.
Use a blender or a hand mixer to purify the mixture until smooth.
The mixture goes back to the pot and adds the milk cream. Reheat the mixture with medium heat till hot.
Agrega sal y pimienta al gusto.

huckleberry-shrub.name: Huckleberry Shrub
instructions: Place huckleberries in a 1-qt. jar. Bring sugar and vinegar to a boil in a small saucepan, stirring to dissolve sugar.
Pour hot vinegar mixture over berries and mix with a fork, crushing berries gently to release more flavor. Seal jar and store in a cool dark place 4 days.
Strain shrub through a fine-mesh sieve lined with cheesecloth into a clean jar; cover and chill. Check shrub every week or so until vinegar flavor mellows to your liking.
For each drink, combine 3 Tbsp. shrub with 1 cup club soda in a glass filled with ice. Taste and add more shrub if you like.
Do Ahead: Shrub can be made 6 months ahead. Keep chilled.
